features: Dispatch Dashboard now includes an Assign Now shortcut panel
Pending client patrol requests show directly on Dispatch Dashboard
Each pending request shows request number, property, address, priority/time, guard selector, and Assign Now button
Assign Now calls existing Supabase RPC cp_admin_assign_patrol_request
Successful assignment refreshes app data and moves request to assigned status
Selected guard should see the assigned job in Guard Dashboard / Active Job workflow
No new SQL required if existing consolidated assignment RPC is installed
